title: An Unconventional Play on the Artificial Intelligence Theme
text: This undervalued and overlooked area of the market can generate income while providing AI exposure.

title: 3 Machine Learning Stocks to Buy to Turn $10,000 Into $1 Million
text: Many of today's hot stocks pushing artificial intelligence and machine learning may go the way of Long Blockchain Corp. That is to say; companies are jumping on the bandwagon and using AI or ML buzzwords to push stock prices higher – even if there's limited relevance to their operations.  A few firms, long entrenched in machine learning, are positioned to withstand the inevitable market cooling towards the new technology.

title: Iron Mountain Schedules Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: PORTSMOUTH, N.H.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE: IRM), a global leader in innovative storage, data center infrastructure, asset lifecycle management and information management services, will report its second quarter 2023 financial results before market hours on Thursday, August 3, 2023. The Company will also host a conference call to discuss results on the same day. The earnings press release, conference call slides, and supplemental financial information will be available.

title: Iron Mountain announces the election of Theodore R. Samuels to the Board of Directors
text: PORTSMOUTH, N.H.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE: IRM), a global leader in innovative storage, data center infrastructure, asset lifecycle management and information management services, has elected Theodore R. Samuels to the Board of Directors, effective July 17, 2023. Mr. Samuels brings more than 35 years of expertise in the financial industry to the Iron Mountain Board, with a background in capital markets and investments. Mr. Samuels was an investor at Capital Group, one.

title: The Retirees' Dividend Portfolio: John And Jane's June 2023 Taxable Account Update
text: The Taxable Account generated $2,111.31 of dividend income for June 2023 compared with $1,825.40 of dividend income for June 2022. The Taxable Account had a balance of $533.9K as of June 30, 2023, vs. $493.5K on June 30, 2022. The annualized cost basis yield is 5.44%. Five companies in the Taxable portfolio paid increased dividends or paid a special dividend during the month of June.

title: The 7 Best Cybersecurity Stocks to Buy in July
text: While most everyone appreciates the conveniences that digitalization and its underlying connectivity foster, investors should nevertheless consider the best cybersecurity stocks to buy. Although people should think the best of each other, that's just not reality.
